-DSIMDE_X86_SSE2_NATIVE -DSIMDE_X86_SSE3_NATIVE -DSIMDE_X86_SSE_NATIVE -DSIMDE_X86_XOP_HAVE_COM_ -DSIMDE_X86_XOP_NATIVE -mno-avx512f -march=native -DSIMDE_X86_AVX2_NATIVE -DSIMDE_X86_VPCLMULQDQ_NATIVE -march=native  -pipe -fPIC -Wall -fno-strict-aliasing -rdynamic -Wno-packed-bitfield-compat -std=c++11  -O2 -g   -ggdb2 -Wl,-rpath -Wl,/home/zyzy/zy-OAI
